buy.group-only: ❌ The /buy command only works in group chats.
buy.what-to-buy: What do you want to buy?
buy.expiry-date: Days until expiry? (example: 5, "1 week", "2 weeks", "1 month")
buy.invalid-date: Invalid format. Please enter days (e.g. 5) or a variant (e.g. 1 week, 2 months) or click Skip.
shop.expiry-prompt: 📅 Expiry date for {item}? Enter days (e.g. 30) or a variant (e.g. 1 week, 2 months) or click Skip.
shop.invalid-date: Invalid format. Please enter days (e.g. 5) or a variant (e.g. 1 week, 2 months) or click Skip.
prices.group-only: ❌ The /prices command only works in group chats.
prices.not-found: ❌ No price data found for that item.
start.welcome: Welcome to ProductTrackerBot! Here are the available commands:
start.no-commands: Welcome to ProductTrackerBot! No commands are currently available.
ai.usage-hint:
Usage: /ai <your question>
Example: /ai what did we buy most this month?
ai.error.unsafe-query: ❌ Could not generate a safe query for that question. Please try rephrasing.
ai.error.service-unavailable: ❌ AI service is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
ai.error.no-result: ❌ No answer was returned. Please try rephrasing your question.
